focused_reports.claim: Sanctuary melody family tracks 32..39 map to eight sequence blocks with a stable 3-word top-level table, two pointer groups, and repeated channel/phrase segment shapes.

next_work: identify the sequence entry table shape that maps the APU track command to channel/subsequence pointers
map high-byte command candidates to the SPC700 driver dispatch paths
use command semantics to promote exact finite endings and loop/fade export policy
